test_cwfv_0_ghfli
cases.code:
wave w = placeholder(1000);

playWave(w);       //0xf24fff81
playWave(1, w);    // (same: 0xf24fff81)
playWave(1, 2, w); //0xf24fff01
playWave(2, w);    //0xf24fff41
playWave(2, 1, w); //0xf24fff01

wait(16);

playWave(w, w);                //0xf24fbf83
playWave(1, w, 2, w);          //0xf24fbf83
playWave(1, 2, w, 1, w);       //0xf24fdf03
playWave(1, 2, w, 1, 2, w);    //0xf24f9f03
playWave(2, w, 1, w);          //0xf24fdf43


wait(16);

playWave(1, w, 1, w); //0xf24fdf83

playWave(2, w, 2, w); //0xf24fbf43
playWave(1, w, 1, 2, w); //0xf24f9f83
playWave(2, w, 1, 2, w);  // 0xf24f9f43
